worldIdProof.description: World ID proof verifies user is unique human without revealing identity

zkProof.description: ZK proof shows balance >= required amount WITHOUT revealing actual balance

trade.description: Trade details encrypted before submission - this is just the plaintext representation

privacyNotes.worldIdProof: Proves humanity without KYC - nullifier_hash prevents duplicate accounts
privacyNotes.zkProof: Balance proof never reveals actual wallet balance - only proves sufficiency
privacyNotes.orderEncryption: In production, trade details would be encrypted with CRE public key
privacyNotes.creMatching: CRE decrypts orders inside TEE, matches them, and only reveals matched pairs
